channel.title: Music on Aman Ahuja
channel.description: Recent content in Music on Aman Ahuja

item.title: Meyer, Nadja, Shosta, and Mahler
item.description:
Originally published on my old blog, Pafnuty blog. Reposted here as an effort to consolidate writing into one place. The original publication date was: September 27, 2010.

Concert, September 25th 2010 Rossini’s Sonata No. 1 in G Major Bottesini’s Concerto for Double-Bass in b Shostakovich’s Chamber Symphony (arr. Barshai) Mahler’s Adagietto from Symphony No. 5 in c#
